title: gnaphalium genevoisi
intro: Gnaphalium genevoisi, also known as the Geneves Cotton-Top, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Alps. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which have been employed to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Gnaphalium genevoisi include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil for topical use, taking advantage of its medicinal properties.
